_comment: Flow -> headless scene map for the UI-flow gate (UI_FUNNEL_DECOMPOSITION S8). Each flow runs as `cargo xtask ui-snap <scene> --script scripts/ui-flows/<flow>.json`; the scene builds a fixture (crates/manifold-app/src/ui_snapshot/fixtures.rs) whose tree carries the flow's selectors. Scenes derived from selectors vs fixtures.rs + the fixed rules (select-and-inspect=inspector; scene-setup-*=gltfscene except empty-states=timeline; drag-clip=timeline) and VERIFIED by scripts/run_ui_flows.py: every 'flows' entry PASSes; every 'expected_fail' entry is a known-red flow (mapped to its correct authoring scene, red for a tracked/pending reason, NOT a mapping error — the whole-scene sweep confirmed none pass under any built-in fixture). Validate/regenerate: python3 scripts/run_ui_flows.py.
_path_triggers_comment: Landing flow gate (BUG-313 postmortem): `python3 scripts/run_ui_flows.py --touched <git-range>` diffs the range, matches each touched path against these prefixes, and runs the union of the mapped flow-name filters (same substring semantics as positional filters). A touched scripts/ui-flows/<flow>.json always runs that flow. No prefix match = exit 0, nothing run. Keep prefixes on the UI value-path surfaces flows actually exercise; a new panel/projection file with flow coverage gets a row here in the same commit.

param-step-action.reason: step 6 asserts an 'A'/'S' step-button under_text='Amount'; finds 0 on main (stale flow assert, pre-existing). Tracked OPEN.

scene-panel-card-convergence-c-p1b-objec.reason: asserts name='scene_setup.object.roughness_value'; the converged object rows still expose name=None (no queryable widget name). Tracked (scene-flow no-name class; BUG-294 dock-scroll was the sibling, now fixed).

audio-clip-trigger-add.reason: authored 14/14 green on the GLOW inspector (2026-07-10 audio-dock-p3b); now 3 'Snare' buttons match where the flow needs exactly 1 — inspector fixture gained trigger drawers since authoring. Untracked before S8.

audio-dock-toggle.reason: authored 9/9 green opening the dock via cmd+shift+A from the inspector (2026-07-10 audio-dock-p1); now the asserted inspector 'Amount' row is not found post-toggle. Untracked before S8.

audio-dock-scroll.reason: reaches the consumer-row scroll assert; 'EXTRA 23 • Bloom • Amount' lands at y~1405 vs expected 1132 (~273px). Suspect stale expected rect after the BUG-251/294 dock-scroll fixes. Untracked before S8.

calibrated-param-card-reads-manifest.reason: asserts Count(5) 'Amount' labels; inspector fixture now renders 3. Stale count vs fixture drift since authoring (2026-07-09 param-boundaries-p2). Untracked before S8.

drag-clip-release-over-inspector.reason: authored 12/12 green on timeline (2026-07-08 drag-capture-p1); now asserts a 'Video 3' clip the timeline fixture no longer builds. Untracked before S8.

scene-setup-ux-p2-demo.reason: step 2 asserts 3 'Roughness' matches (nth=2); 5363e97c's curated card intentionally hides material params from the generator CARD, leaving 1. Stale flow vs intended curation, NOT a value-sync bug (BUG-313's id-join landed green). Re-author against the scene panel's restored material rows — BUG-315.
